channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.4%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting allies claim more MPs asking Starmer to resign, as No 10 says health secretary has PM’s full confidence - UK politics live
item.description: Streeting allies claim more MPs asking Starmer to resign, as No 10 says health secretary has PM’s full confidence - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: It’s Rayner or no-one facing Starmer in Labour leadership contest, Corbyn says
item.description: It’s Rayner or no-one facing Starmer in Labour leadership contest, Corbyn says

item.title: Independent UK Politics: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer
item.description: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10
item.description: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10

item.title: The Times: Is Wes Streeting fixing the NHS or is this one fight he can’t win? - The Times
item.description: Is Wes Streeting fixing the NHS or is this one fight he can’t win? - The Times

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: LabourList’s polling is consistently a few points off to the left of the actual membership. Streeting could be as high as 27 per cent!
item.description: LabourList’s polling is consistently a few points off to the left of the actual membership. Streeting could be as high as 27 per cent!

item.title: The Guardian: Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’ - The Guardian
item.description: Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’ - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: PM insists he will still fight on as Streeting holds off on launching leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: PM insists he will still fight on as Streeting holds off on launching leadership challenge

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Today’s newsletter: on the individual decisions that could doom Keir Starmer or secure him in place:
item.description: Today’s newsletter: on the individual decisions that could doom Keir Starmer or secure him in place:

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’
item.description: Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’
